parts.answer: An answer including the following points:  Dilution factor calculated (1)  Volume of 5% solution and water stated (1) e.g. 5 ÷ 2= 2.5 accept C V = C V accept 4 stock to 6 water e.g. 1 cm of 5% added to 1.5 cm of water 0.4 cm of 5% to 0.6 cm water 2 cm to 3 cm of water correct answer with no working gains 2 marks Pearson Education Limited.
